runs.content: finance: 'The Briefing: Meta's Smart PR Approach' (The Information Briefing, 2026-07-13) -> moved to raw/finance/the-information-briefing-meta-spacex-2026-07-13.md (tags updated: removed clipping/unsorted, added meta, spacex, stock-valuation, data-center-capex, ipo-lockup, ingested); wiki summary created at wiki/finance/source-the-information-briefing-meta-spacex-2026-07-13.md. Key content: Meta's Louisiana DC PR spin ($40B more, $50B total) vs shareholder reality (META -8.6% 12mo, forward sales multiple 9.3x->6.3x); rental-capacity rally judged an overreaction; SpaceX -34% from post-IPO high, nearing its $135 IPO price with a lockup unlock ahead; Samsung Yongin chip plant accelerated to 2029; global smartphone shipments -11% in Q2 (weakest Q2 in 13yr, Counterpoint Research). Reverse links added in data-meta-compute-cloud-pivot-2026-07-05.md, source-the-information-meta-ai-briefing-2026.md, source-morningstar-mega-ipos-market-impact-2026.md, data-hbm-supply-chain-2026-06-27.md, source-semianalysis-cxmt-dram-incumbents-2026-06-23.md. index.md updated. Clippings folder now empty.
